---
title: "Late Pleistocene: East Asia (LP_EA)"
---

```{r}
#| cache = FALSE
knitr::read_chunk('Mapcode.r')
```

```{r, Loadpackages, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(leaflet)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(leaflegend)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(htmltools)
```

```{r, Loaddata7, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
```

```{r, Loadmap7}
```
